_comment: Goal-focused lines · 12 day rhythms × 6 goals (money · work · love · family · health · travel) = 72 lines · shown only when the user picks a goal · translated from the Thai original (10 Jul 2026)
建|wealth: Money: a fine day to start a new savings plan
建|career: Work: open the project or start the new job — beginnings get a push today
建|love: Love: open your heart, send the first hello, start the relationship — lovely timing
建|family: Family: start a new house tradition — tonight's dinner together can be day one
建|health: Health: day one of the workout plan — start today and it sticks
建|travel: Travel: set off on the maiden trip — a new journey opens smoothly
除|wealth: Money: cut the leaking expenses and wipe out the small debts, every last one
除|career: Work: clear the backlog — and quitting what has no future lands clean today
除|love: Love: clear the air, patch the misunderstanding, close the old chapter for good
除|family: Family: deep-clean the house, toss the old stuff — clear home, clear head
除|health: Health: start the treatment, pull the tooth, detox, quit smoking — strong cutting power today
除|travel: Travel: cancel the trip that isn't right — a better route can take its place
滿|wealth: Money: goods and income flow in from many directions — just record every bit
滿|career: Work: the company party or team gathering tightens your work bonds
滿|love: Love: engagements and anniversary celebrations — romance in full bloom
滿|family: Family: gather the relatives, host the house blessing — a full, warm table
滿|health: Health: energy at full tank — just don't celebrate your way past the limit
滿|travel: Travel: big group trips are extra fun — plan for a crowd
平|wealth: Money: do the books, pay the bills, negotiate fair and square — all smooth
平|career: Work: routine runs like clockwork — file things into the system, stack quiet points
平|love: Love: a simple, warm day — quiet time together is plenty
平|family: Family: split the chores fairly and settle the house rules on even terms
平|health: Health: easy walks and stretching — keep the steady rhythm
平|travel: Travel: smooth roads the whole way — good for routine trips, safe out and back
定|wealth: Money: lock the price, sign the sale — today's numbers hold for the long run
定|career: Work: settle the position, sign the employment contract — key meetings click into place
定|love: Love: ask to be together, propose, get engaged — promises made today hold firm
定|family: Family: settle the house, the kids, the future — it ends well
定|health: Health: book the doctor, set the long-term treatment plan — a schedule you'll actually keep
定|travel: Travel: book the tickets and the room — locking the plan today feels right on price and heart
執|wealth: Money: chase the debts, chase the invoices, reconcile line by line
執|career: Work: grind the backlog to done, bring people onto the team, perfect the details
執|love: Love: care shown in the small details pays off visibly today
執|family: Family: fix things around the house and chase the household paperwork to completion
執|health: Health: keep the checkup, keep the physio going — discipline is the medicine
執|travel: Travel: check the documents — visa, insurance, everything — before you go
破|wealth: Money: no new investments, no big buys — cutting losses is the only move
破|career: Work: no signings, no launches — only tearing out systems that truly need to go
破|love: Love: don't open a war of words — if it must end, end it calmly, not in today's temper
破|family: Family: skip the family meeting about money and inheritance — it will crack
破|health: Health: postpone non-urgent surgery and watch for accidents born of haste
破|travel: Travel: postpone the important trip — if you must go, allow double the time
危|wealth: Money: don't move the big sums — scams run thick today
危|career: Work: no big promises, no signing in anyone's place — check three times
危|love: Love: emotions swing easily — don't test each other today
危|family: Family: keep the elders and little ones close — guard against slips and falls
危|health: Health: skip risky sports, heights, machinery — and drive slower
危|travel: Travel: avoid lonely routes and long night drives — check the car before leaving
成|wealth: Money: close the sale, receive the payout — the deal ripens right on time
成|career: Work: close the project, hand over the work, unveil the result — a clean win
成|love: Love: wedding, registration, going public — an auspicious day at full strength
成|family: Family: move into the new home, celebrate the family's successes
成|health: Health: finish the treatment course, get the good results — your body rewards you
成|travel: Travel: arrive in style — the important trip can depart today
收|wealth: Money: save, collect, transfer into the nest egg — a receiving-wallet day
收|career: Work: fold the results into your portfolio, wrap the report, claim the credit you're owed
收|love: Love: gather the good memories — look back together at how far you've come
收|family: Family: put things back in place, settle the household accounts, close out the expenses
收|health: Health: collect the test results, take stock, plan the next round
收|travel: Travel: come home safe, unpack the bags, settle the trip expenses
開|wealth: Money: open the new income stream, open the shop, raise prices for good reason
開|career: Work: launch the project, apply for the new job, announce the good news
開|love: Love: go public, confess your feelings — good odds of a good answer
開|family: Family: open the new room, welcome the new member — a lively house
開|health: Health: start the new health program, join the gym — begun today, it lasts
開|travel: Travel: open the big trip, head out far — clear skies and open roads
閉|wealth: Money: close the books, tuck the money away, skip the big shopping — wallet shut
閉|career: Work: close the cycle, file the folders, hold off on new deals — review the plan
閉|love: Love: a quiet night in together beats any party tonight
閉|family: Family: fix the house, seal the leaks, close the door and rest together
閉|health: Health: sleep well and recover in full — the body is repairing itself
閉|travel: Travel: no new trips — stay home and plan the next one
